notes: ProFX input gain at unity (0/midpoint detent), xd master volume full — validated 2026-07-07: max-level patch peaks -8.1 dBFS, 0 clips. IMPORTANT: ProFX must stay at 44.1 kHz native (Audio MIDI Setup); its 48 kHz USB mode duplicates/drops packets on this Mac (2026-07-08). ffmpeg resamples to 48k in-path. Keep ProFX out of the rekordbox aggregate and NOT as system default in/out.
